SELECT col1 && col2 FROM list_test1, list_test2;
SELECT col1 && col2 FROM (SELECT col1 FROM list_test1) AS a, (SELECT col2 FROM list_test2) AS b;
SELECT col3 && [5, 6] FROM list_test3 WHERE 1 IN UNNEST(col3);
SELECT DISTINCT a.col1 && b.col2 FROM list_test1 AS a JOIN list_test2 AS b ON a.col1[1] = b.col2[1];
CREATE TABLE nested_subquery_test (id INTEGER, values_list LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, values_list && [3, 6] FROM nested_subquery_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM nested_subquery_test WHERE 1 IN UNNEST(values_list));
SELECT (SELECT col1 FROM list_test1 LIMIT 1) && (SELECT col2 FROM list_test2 LIMIT 1);
SELECT col1 && (SELECT col2 FROM list_test2 LIMIT 1) FROM list_test1;
